description: At a narrative pivot, hold the current scene, blur it (full-frame gaussian), and bring a short connector phrase over it; hold a beat, then the next beat hard-cuts to the reveal.
whenToUse: A cliffhanger / pivot connector: 'and then...', 'after that...', 'but then...', 'suddenly...', 'until...'. The script pauses on the suspense word before the turn.
generalize: Which scene is blurred (reuse the CURRENT beat's art, draw nothing new), the connector phrase, the blur amount, and the hold length are SLOTS.
produces: reuse the current scene image as bgUrl; the connector phrase = a gpt-image-2 label (label-handwritten voice, dark ink) via magenta color-key -> centered sharp overlay; SceneComposite applies a full-frame gaussian blur to the bg and hard-appears the text.

field.note: carried from the current scene (usually unchanged)

sceneRef.note: the current scene image to blur (reuse the prior beat's bg; do NOT draw a new one)

blurStartFrame.note: sharp for a moment, then blurs in

styleLock: The connector phrase is gpt-image-2 lettering (label-handwritten voice), never a font. No new illustration is generated — the scene is the prior beat's image.
rules: Reuse the CURRENT scene art; draw nothing new.
Text stays sharp on top of the blurred background; it hard-appears (no scale animation).
Land the blur + text on the spoken connector; hold, then the next beat hard-cuts to the reveal.
Use only for genuine pivot/cliffhanger connectors.
